summary: 3D Navigation View feature testing complete. All 10 test cases passed. 3D mode toggle works correctly, all 3D HUD elements (turn banner, speed limit, current speed, nav bar) render properly with active route, cancel/reroute buttons accessible in 3D mode, and 2D HUDs correctly hidden when in 3D mode.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: 3D mode toggle button works - shows '2D' when in 2D mode, '3D' when in 3D mode
VERIFIED: Navigation3DView component renders with Mapbox GL JS canvas when is3DMode=true
VERIFIED: data-testid='3d-turn-banner' visible with gold gradient background and turn arrow
VERIFIED: data-testid='3d-speed-limit' shows speed limit sign with SPEED LIMIT text and number
VERIFIED: data-testid='3d-current-speed' shows current speed in mph with gold styling
VERIFIED: data-testid='3d-nav-bar' shows Distance, Time, ETA, and street name
VERIFIED: Cancel route (X) and Reroute buttons visible on right side in 3D mode when driving
VERIFIED: 2D HUDs (top turn instruction, bottom nav bar) hidden when is3DMode=true
VERIFIED: 2D HUDs appear correctly when is3DMode=false and route is active
VERIFIED: data-testid='3d-stop-sign' conditionally renders only when trafficSigns has stop sign type

test_results.3d_mode_toggle_works: PASS - Clicking 2D button switches to 3D mode, button text updates
test_results.3d_turn_banner_visible: PASS - Gold turn instruction banner visible at top with distance and direction
test_results.3d_speed_limit_visible: PASS - Speed limit sign visible on left side showing limit (30 mph)
test_results.3d_current_speed_visible: PASS - Current speed display visible showing 0 mph
test_results.3d_nav_bar_visible: PASS - Bottom navigation bar visible with Distance/Time/ETA
test_results.3d_stop_sign_conditional: PASS - Stop sign alert not visible (requires trafficSigns data with stop type)
test_results.2d_top_hud_appears: PASS - Top turn instruction HUD appears in 2D mode with active route
test_results.2d_bottom_nav_bar_appears: PASS - Bottom nav bar with cancel/reroute buttons appears in 2D mode
test_results.3d_mode_hides_2d_huds: PASS - 3D HUD elements hidden when switched to 2D mode
test_results.3d_cancel_reroute_buttons: PASS - Cancel and Reroute buttons accessible on right side in 3D mode

seed_data_creation: None - used search for 'Dallas, TX' to create route
context_for_next_testing_agent: App at http://localhost:8001. Vite+Express single-stack. 3D Navigation View feature fully implemented and tested. To test 3D mode: 1) Click Navigation in sidebar, 2) Search for destination (e.g., 'Dallas, TX'), 3) Click ROUTE button, 4) Click 2D/3D toggle button on right side controls. All data-testid attributes verified: 3d-turn-banner, 3d-speed-limit, 3d-current-speed, 3d-nav-bar, 3d-stop-sign. The 3D view uses Mapbox GL JS with navigation-night-v1 style. Stop sign alert only appears when trafficSigns prop contains stop sign type.
